comments: Approved. The contract scope matches the manifest's bounded M6-B cleanup: it archives tasks/v0.4-* and tasks/v0.5-* into .archive/tasks/v0.5-archive/ and replaces docs/*.md and protocol/*.md contents with deprecation notices pointing to documentation/. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids deleting docs/ or protocol/ directories, forbids deleting individual files within them, requires V0.4/V0.5 artifacts to be moved rather than deleted, forbids modification of tasks/v0.6-* artifacts, and forbids workflow state mutations. This is consistent with the requested bounded execution model. Minor note: the manifest checklist explicitly names src/mcp-server/src/index.ts and bin/ as no-modification zones, while the contract expresses that more generally as 'NO workflow state mutations or framework structural changes'; this is acceptable for approval because the contract remains narrower than the authorized cleanup scope and does not permit those changes.
